summary.lv: Dyninno Technologies meklē mobilo izstrādātāju (React Native, iOS) darbam pie Entertech talantu platformas, kas apvieno sociālo tīklu, talantu tirgus un lietotāju iesaistes rīkus.
summary.en: Dyninno Technologies seeks a Mobile Application Developer (React Native, iOS) to build the Entertech talent platform – a blend of social networking, talent marketplace, and user engagement.
